About: It is about the kidnapping and murder of Giulio Regeni.
Affects: It affects Abdel Fattah el-Sisi's regime.
AssociatedWith: It is associated with torture, deaths in prison, and forced disappearances that occurred throughout Egypt during the 2010s.
BelongsTo: It belongs to the context of torture, deaths in prison, and forced disappearances.
CausedBy: It is caused by the suspicion that Egyptian security officials abducted, tortured and killed Giulio Regeni.
DiscoveredAt: It was discovered at a ditch alongside the Cairo–Alexandria highway on the outskirts of Cairo.
HasA: It has clear signs of torture on the body.
It has evidence of letters of the alphabet engraved on the skin with sharp objects.
It has strong diplomatic tensions with Egypt.
It has suspicions of involvement of the Egyptian government itself in the affair and in the subsequent coverups.
It has evidence of extreme torture on the body.
It has contusions and abrasions all over from a severe beating.
It has extensive bruising from kicks, punches, and assault with a stick.
It has more than two dozen bone fractures.
It has multiple stab wounds on the body including the soles of the feet.
It has numerous cuts over the entire body made with a sharp instrument suspected to be a razor.
HasFeatureOf: It is characterized by the practice of torture widely documented as a distinctive trait of the Egyptian police.
InfluencedBy: It was influenced by the Tahrir Square protests.
IsA: It is an event that attracted national and international attention.
It is a heated political debate.
It is a context of torture, deaths in prison, and forced disappearances.
KnownFor: It is known for the torture and murder of Giulio Regeni.
OccurredIn: It occurred in the province of Udine.
OccurredOn: It occurred on 25 January 2016.
It occurred on 3 February 2016.
It occurred on 1 March 2016.
It occurred on 24 March 2016.
It occurred on 1 November 2016.
It occurred on 7 June 2016.
It occurred on 8 June 2016.
It occurred on early December 2017.
It occurred on 21 December 2017.
It occurred on 7 December 2016.
PerformedBy: It was performed by Egyptian police.
It was performed by Abdel Fattah el-Sisi's regime.
It was performed by Egyptian security services.
It was performed by Egyptian security officials.
It was performed by four men allegedly responsible for kidnapping Regeni.
It was performed by a criminal gang.
It was performed by Muslim Brotherhood.
It was performed by plainclothes police officers.
It was performed by Egypt's National Security Agency.
It was performed by captain Mahmud Hendy.
PublishedIn: It was published in The New York Times.
